page_content:
CHEM136 General Chemistry Laboratory for Engineers (1 Credit)

A laboratory course for engineering majors intending to take CHEM231 and CHEM232.

Prerequisite: Must have completed or be concurrently enrolled in CHEM135 and must have math eligibility of MATH120 or higher. Restriction: Must be in a major in ENGR-A. James Clark School of Engineering.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
